commands.review_summary:
The branch adds owner-gated `read`/`write`/`edit` coding tools to Gateway HTTP/SDK direct invoke with new `gateway.tools.directInvoke` opt-ins, deny-list/audit/docs/test updates, and plugin-SDK surface budget changes.

PR surface: Source +316, Tests +435, Docs +128, Other 0. Total +879 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. The PR body supplies a nine-case live Gateway/SDK terminal proof, and source inspection confirms the owner-gated paths it exercises.
